---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for a new feature
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you want to propose.

## Problem to Solve

Describe the problem or use case that this feature would solve.

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you envision this feature working.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternatives or other features you have considered.

## Example Use Case

Provide a concrete example of how this feature would be used.

## Mockups/Design (Optional)

If applicable, add mockups or designs to help explain the feature.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched for similar issues in the repository
- [ ] I have confirmed this feature doesn't exist
- [ ] I have considered security and privacy implications
